semantic_findings.raw_rule: mode(row[r] concatenated with column[c]), with Python first-occurrence tie-breaking
semantic_findings.raw_generator_mismatch_cause: The raw solver is only an approximation to stripe restoration. One audited mismatch is non-tied (raw color count 10 versus generator color count 9); three are first-occurrence ties selecting another stripe color. This is not a tie-break implementation error.
semantic_findings.generator_rule: Build row-mode and column-mode reconstructions, compare their total agreement with the noisy input, and select the higher-agreement orientation.

required_stages: per-line color argmax with deterministic tie handling
sound_onnx_floor.comparison_to_incumbent: Even one counted line histogram is at least 25x the entire cost-24 incumbent. Both orientations and selection require additional tensors.
sound_onnx_floor.single_node_direct_output: No allowed standard ONNX operator simultaneously performs global per-color row/column counts, data-dependent mode/orientation selection, and full one-hot emission. The only observed cost-24 construction uses the expressly forbidden 20-input giant Einsum polynomial.

decision.reason_fresh_dual_ort_not_run: No sound candidate can truthfully cost less than 24, so no ONNX model reached the candidate gate.
